reviews.comment:
Las instalaciones están limpias, bien mantenidas y cuentan con baños en buen estado, algo que se valora mucho cuando uno va de paso. También me gusta que el lugar es seguro y con buena iluminación, incluso de noche.

Ideal para cargar, descansar unos minutos y seguir viaje. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The facilities are clean, well-maintained, and have clean restrooms, which is much appreciated when you're just passing through. I also like that the place is safe and well-lit, even at night.

Ideal for charging, resting for a few minutes, and continuing your journey. Highly recommended.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias afolfo por tu comentario saludos

reviews.comment:
El 15/07/25 fui a hacer el cambio de aceite. El turno lo reservé a través de la app de ypf como siempre porque funciona bien, nunca había tenido problemas (suelo hacerlo en jujuy porque vivo ahi), siempre perfecto. Cuando voy a pagar, me dicen que no funciona la app de ypf, me cobraron un valor total que no estoy seguro si correspondía, no me dejaron pagar con las 6 cuotas sin interés que habilita la app y no me sumaron los puntos serviclub, una verdadera estafa, porque el ACA se beneficia de los pedidos recibidos de clientes de ypf, pero a la vez no te reconocen ninguno de los términos y condiciones. Obviamente no vuelvo nunca más a esa sucursal.

(Translated by Google)
On July 15, 2025, I went to get my oil changed. I booked the appointment through the YPF app, as usual, because it works well; I've never had any problems before (I usually do it in Jujuy because I live there), and it's always been perfect. When I went to pay, they told me the YPF app wasn't working. They charged me a total amount that I'm not sure was correct, they wouldn't let me pay in the 6 interest-free installments the app offers, and they didn't credit my Serviclub points. It's a real rip-off, because ACA benefits from orders received from YPF customers, but at the same time, they don't honor any of the terms and conditions. Obviously, I'm never going back to that branch.

reviewReply.comment: Esta página no es de boxes gracias sino del full y playa saludos
